title: cyperus diffusus subsp. sylvestris
intro: Cyperus diffusus subsp. sylvestris, also known as the forest umbrella sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which make it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Cyperus diffusus subsp. sylvestris include the treatment of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related problems, as well as its use as a natural remedy for reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism. Cyperus diffusus subsp. sylvestris can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal medicine to make a poultice or ointment for topical application.
